results.title: 'For the students. By the students': Alia Bhatt backs CJP-led students' protest
results.description: NEET paper leak: Alia Bhatt has backed the Cockroach Janta Party-led student protest seeking Dharmendra Pradhan’s resignation. Her Instagram post joins Salman Khan and other actors supporting students demanding accountability after the exam controversy.

results.title: MK Party Raises Bias Concerns Over Phala Phala Impeachment Committee Evidence Leader Nominations
results.description: CAPE TOWN — Political parties now have until 6 p.m. on Friday to submit additional nominations for the evidence leader of Parliament’s Phala Phala impeachment committee. The extension comes amid growing concerns over the perceived bias of certain nominees tasked with probing the 2020 theft of foreign currency from President Cyril Ramaphosa’s farm. uMkhonto weSizwe [...]
